title: URL Screenshot Worker
description: Takes screenshots of specified web pages with various customization options

urls.title: URLs to Screenshot
urls.description: List of URLs to take screenshots of

fullPage.title: Full Page Screenshot
fullPage.description: Take screenshot of the entire page (not just viewport)

scrollToBottom.title: Scroll to Bottom
scrollToBottom.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page before taking screenshot

delayAfterScrolling.title: Delay After Scrolling (ms)
delayAfterScrolling.description: Delay in milliseconds after scrolling to bottom

waitUntil.title: Wait Until
waitUntil.description: When to consider page navigation complete

delay.title: Delay Before Screenshot (ms)
delay.description: Additional delay in milliseconds before taking screenshot

timeout.title: Page Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for page load in seconds

selectorsToHide.title: Selectors to Hide
selectorsToHide.description: CSS selectors to hide before taking screenshot

waitForSelector.title: Wait for Selector
waitForSelector.description: Wait for this selector to appear before taking screenshot
